signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $119
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $119.6M | YES | HIGH confidence**
U.S. spot XRP ETFs attracted $119.6 million in inflows—the strongest single-day intake since December 2025—signaling renewed institutional demand.[5] This accounted for over half of all global crypto fund inflows for the week.[1]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Integrates XRP | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Integrates XRP | YES | HIGH confidence**
Rakuten integrated XRP into its Rakuten Pay system, enabling its 44 million users to convert XRP into loyalty points, representing a major step toward mainstream retail utility.[5]

Ethereum Outperforms with 8.6% Gain | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ethereum rallied 8.6% to $2,377, outperforming every major token on the day, backed by Layer 2 expansion developments.[1][2]

signals.headline: Bitcoin Breaks $75,000 on Iran Peace Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Breaks $75,000 on Iran Peace Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**
Bitcoin surged 5.9% above $75,000 following Iran's signal to resume peace talks with the United States, ending bearish pressure from Middle East tensions.[1]
